summary: Aero ride-hailing MVP tested end-to-end. 20/20 backend pytest tests passed covering health, auth (me/role/forbidden), public estimate, full ride lifecycle (request->assign->on_trip->completed->rate), driver status/earnings, and admin stats/users/trips with role gating. Frontend verified for all 3 roles via localStorage session_token bypass: login (Aero brand + Google btn + AR toggle), customer /home (Leaflet map + ride types with fares + cash mode), driver /dashboard (Online toggle + map), admin /dashboard (revenue + counts). Language toggle (EN<->AR) works with RTL. No critical issues.

minor.issue: Does not validate trip ownership; any authenticated user can change status of any trip. Consider scoping to customer_id/driver_id.

Mock random driver_id is not persisted in users collection, so /api/rides/mine for a driver token will not surface auto-assigned trips. Acceptable since auto-assignment is mocked, but driver dashboard 'today_trips' will always be 0 unless real drivers exist.
Unauthenticated endpoint that promotes any email to admin. Should be removed or protected before production.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents); Image style.resizeMode deprecated. Cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.issue: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 - Expo expects 2.2.0. Currently working but may break on native build.

action_items: (Optional) Add ownership validation in POST /api/rides/{trip_id}/status (only customer/driver of trip).
(Optional) Replace deprecated style props (shadow*, pointerEvents, Image resizeMode).
(Optional) Align async-storage version to 2.2.0 for Expo compat.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 454-line file - acceptable for MVP but will benefit from splitting routers (auth/rides/driver/admin) when features grow.
MongoDB _id excluded properly via projection {'_id': 0} everywhere.
Auth supports both Bearer header and session_token cookie - good.
Frontend correctly uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login + 3 role routes + lang toggle + ride selection + map iframe)

seed_data_creation: None. Used pre-seeded session tokens. Tests create trips with TEST_PICKUP/TEST_DEST address tags but trip records are not deleted (acceptable for now; admin stats reflect them).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use Bearer tokens test_session_aero_{customer|driver|admin}. Frontend bypass: localStorage.setItem('session_token','...') then goto '/'. Note language persists across sessions in i18n, so when testing English-named tabs ensure language is reset first. Customer ride flow: tap a destination card (Downtown Dubai / Dubai Marina) -> ride type cards with fares appear -> 'Confirm Ride' (تأكيد الرحلة).
